CustomField.description: This field identifies the field on the Contact Object that will be used to perform the search against. The default field is, Text_Resume__c. The Full API Name is required to be entered into this field to work properly.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This field identifies the field on the Contact Object that will be used to perform the search against. The default field is, Text_Resume__c.
CustomField.label: Contact Match Field
